output.title: Implement Exponential Backoff and Dead-Letter Queue for Payment Webhook Processing
output.summary: This pull request introduces a retry policy for payment webhook processing, implementing exponential backoff for transient failures and ensuring failed events are sent to a dead-letter queue.
changes: Added exponential backoff retry logic to the payment webhook handler.
Implemented dead-letter queue handling for failed payment events.
testPlan: Test that the webhook handler retries processing a payment event up to 5 times for transient failures.
Verify that failed events are correctly published to the dead-letter queue.
Ensure that retry metrics are emitted for observability.
Check that replaying events does not result in duplicate charges.
risks: Potential for increased load on the system during peak traffic due to retries.
Need to ensure that dead-letter queue handling does not lead to data loss.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the system closely after deployment for any unexpected behavior, particularly during peak traffic periods.

output.title: Add retry policy for payment webhook processing
output.summary: This pull request implements a retry policy for processing payment webhooks, addressing intermittent failures during peak traffic. It introduces exponential backoff retries and dead-letter queue handling for failed events.
changes: Implemented exponential backoff retry logic for payment webhook processing with a maximum of 5 retries.
Added dead-letter queue handling for events that fail after retries.
testPlan: Test that the webhook handler retries transient failures up to 5 times.
Verify that failed events are correctly persisted to the dead-letter queue.
Ensure that retry metrics are emitted for observability.
Confirm that no duplicate charge side effects occur on replay of events.
risks: Potential for increased latency in processing if retries are triggered frequently.
Need to ensure that the dead-letter queue is monitored and processed appropriately to avoid data loss.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the performance and error rates of the payment webhook processing after deployment to ensure the retry logic is functioning as expected.
